import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './AboutStats.css'; const PORTRAIT_IMG = 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/LG47yzJKYPaE9iSMjClLZQLV0Iw.jpg'; const stats = [ { value: '15', suffix: '+', label: 'Years of Experience' }, { value: '100', suffix: '+', label: 'Projects Completed' }, { value: '97', suffix: '%', label: 'Client Satisfaction Rate' }, { value: '75', suffix: '%', label: 'Conversion Rate Improvement' }, ]; export default function AboutStats() { return (
{/* Row 1: "About us" label + Heading */}
About us

We blend creativity with precision, transforming ideas into{' '} impactful brand identities, sleek user interfaces, and standout digital assets.

{/* Row 2: Stats cards (left) + Sticky portrait (right) */}
{/* Left: stacked stat cards + CTA */}
{stats.map((s) => (
{s.value} {s.suffix}

{s.label}

))} {/* CTA card */}
More about us ↗
{/* Right: sticky portrait */}
{/* ── Bold Ideas Section ── */}
{/* Line 1: Bold Ideas [img] Striking Designs */}
Bold Ideas
Striking Designs
{/* Line 2: [img] Precision in Every Pixel */}
Precision in Every Pixel
{/* Line 3: Design Without [img] Limits */}

Limits
); }
